title: Over 100 students fall ill after eating food at State-run school in Odisha, 1 dead; CM orders probe
content: The school's headteacher, Jayant Kumar Panigrahi, has been suspended on charges of negligence on duty, and the government has announced ₹7 lakh ex gratia to the family of the deceased student, officials said

title: India to host Foreign Minister-level meetings of BRICS and Quad in May
content: The confirmation has come days after U.S. Ambassador Sergio Gor said on a social media post that Secretary of State Marco Rubio will visit India “next month”, i.e. in May

title: PIL in HC seeks headphone-based audio-enabled VVPAT system in polls
content: Nethrodaya, a public charitable trust, working for the empowerment of the visually challenged, has filed the public interest litigation petition

title: PM inaugurates Delhi-Dehradun expressway
content: The 213-km access-controlled corridor now open for use is expected to significantly improve regional connectivity, linking key towns and integrating with major national corridors, before reaching Dehradun

title: Modi, Trump discuss need to keep Strait of Hormuz secure
content: The telephone call from the U.S. President came three days after the U.S. and Iran held a round of talks in Islamabad to resolve the West Asia crisis

title: Annual fishing ban commences in coastal Tamil Nadu from April 15
content: Under the Tamil Nadu Marine Fishing Regulation Act 1983, considering the breeding season of fish and to protect fishery resources, a fishing ban is implemented every year along the East Coast of Tamil Nadu for 61 days from April 15 to June 14

title: Constitution Amendment Bill proposes possible change in size of State Assemblies
content: The proposed amendments, in effect, mean that State Assemblies will see a change in their total number of seats, depending on population changes and constituency boundaries within States will also be redrawn as part of the delimitation exercise

title: Centre moots inter-State redistribution of Lok Sabha seats based on 2011 Census
content:
Govt circulates drafts of Constitution Amendment Bill and Delimitation Bill; If proposals are accepted, share of Lok Sabha seats of southern States will shrink; 
Bills propose increase in size of Lok Sabha to a maximum of 850 seats

title: Modi asks BJP workers in Bengal to list Trinamool’s ‘crimes’
content: PM stresses booth-level mobilisation and asks cadre to highlight alleged governance failures ahead of polls

title: Trinamool paved way for BJP in West Bengal, says Rahul Gandhi
content: Addresses rallies in Uttar Dinajpur, Malda and Murshidabad districts, seeking support for party candidates; this marks his first campaign in State since 2021 Assembly polls

title: Stalin warns of massive protests against delimitation; Revanth calls for united southern front
content: In a “final warning” to the PM, T.N. CM says protests will bring State to a standstill; Karnataka CM accuses BJP of trying to “redistribute political power”

title: GE Aerospace, HAL near final deal on co-production of F414 jet engines
content: The two sides, which have been in talks for nearly three years since signing an agreement on the co-production of F414 fighter jet engines, are now close to concluding key elements of the programme

title: Rajnath Singh to visit Germany from April 21; submarine deal likely high on the agenda
content: German defence major Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems (TKMS) is close to finalising the deal, estimated to be worth over $8 billion; the submarines are expected to be built primarily in India by Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Limited in Mumbai, in collaboration with TKMS

title: Delimitation is the BJP’s tool to divide Bengal and India, says Mamata
content: Trinamool Congress chairperson Mamata Banerjee, said that the BJP is attempting a delimitation exercise without a full majority

title: Intense contests brewing in the Cauvery delta, the rice bowl of Tamil Nadu
content: The DMK, which had won 37 of the 41 constituencies in nine districts in 2021, is looking to better its performance.  The  AIADMK, which had suffered heavy losses owing to a split in the votes caused by the AMMK and the NTK in several constituencies last time, is hoping that the anti-incumbency factor will turn the tide in its favour

title: Xi calls for closer ties with Spain in face of global 'chaos'
content: "Both China and Spain are principled countries that stand for justice. They should strengthen communication, consolidate mutual trust, and cooperate closely to oppose the world's regression to the law of the jungle," Mr. Xi said during talks in the Great Hall of the People

title: ₹1.50 cr. to redevelop bottlenecked Vyttila Junction
content: Funds cleared after SHRC chief took suo motu action on reports highlighting commuter and pedestrian distress at Vyttila, Kerala’s busiest junction

title: Govt. committed to values espoused by Ambedkar, says Minister
content: Participating in 135th birth anniversary celebrations of Dr. Ambedkar in city, Dola Sree Bala Veeranjaneya Swamy says that Dr. Ambedkar proved that discrimination cannot hinder intellectual progress

title: Watch: The Hindu’s new show - Above the Fold | 14.04.2026
content: Above the Fold is The Hindu’s weekday news show, bringing you the most important stories of the day with clarity, depth, and context. Each episode also spotlights exclusive reporting, sharp analysis, and on-ground stories from The Hindu that you shouldn’t miss.

title: For 33% quota for women before next parliamentary polls, Lok Sabha seats to be increased to up to 850
content: The seats reserved for women in Lok Sabha and legislative Assemblies "shall be allotted by rotation to different constituencies in a state or Union territory," the Bill circulated among Lok Sabha members said

title: Higher vote share for Vijay could work to the DMK’s advantage, says the CPI Tamil Nadu secretary
content: Within the TVK, there is an educated group of people keen on defeating the BJP front which, they believe, is acting against  Tamil Nadu’s interests. Many of them recognise that voting for Vijay may not yield benefits. They understand that the DMK-led alliance has an edge over the AIADMK-led front, says  M. Veerapandian

title: Opposition support crucial to pass women’s reservation and delimitation Bills
content: Parties across the Opposition, and even some allies, flag concerns over ambiguity on delimitation and federal balance

title: WE Hub launches CoE in Peddapalli
content: Facility to boost women entrepreneurship, youth innovation and serve as a hub for skill development, incubation support, digital enablement and enterprise acceleration

title: Kerala polls: Cong leader criticises social media chatter on CM post, says high command will decide
content: Lok Sabha MP Benny Behanan describes ongoing debates on social media as “painful” and unnecessary, and urges party workers and supporters to wait for the election results and the leadership’s decision

title: Vishu fails to bring cheer to hotel and catering industry
content: Less than half the hotels have arranged to provide Vishu sadya, says KHRA president; the stifling heat is also not helping matters with footfall dropping

title: A.P. government will leverage all emerging technologies, says CM
content: The focus will be on quantum deeptech, drones, space and green hydrogen technologies, Naidu says, adding that vision and foresight make wonders

title: The art of pitching, according to the two best pitchers on the planet
content: From the rise of velocity to the future of AI, Tarik Skubal and Paul Skenes share the finer points of the craft.

title: Ex-Michigan coach Moore avoids jail in sentencing
content: Former Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore was sentenced to 18 months' probation Tuesday for misdemeanors related to a confrontation with his executive assistant.

title: Russini resigns from Athletic following Vrabel pics
content: NFL reporter Dianna Russini has resigned from The Athletic less than a week after published photos of her and Patriots coach Mike Vrabel at an Arizona resort prompted an internal investigation at the New York Times-owned sports outlet.

title: Garcia apologizes for outburst on Masters tee box
content: Sergio Garcia issued an apology on social media Tuesday for his outburst during his final round of play at the Masters on Sunday.

title: Eagles GM reiterates Brown stance despite moves
content: Eagles general manager Howie Roseman on Tuesday kept the same public stance regarding wide receiver A.J. Brown despite the team's recent trade for Dontayvion Wicks.

title: Iowa 'disappointed' after NCAA vacates four wins
content: Iowa will have to vacate four victories from the 2023 season for tampering with quarterback Cade McNamara before he'd entered the transfer portal, the NCAA announced Tuesday.

title: Mascherano quits as Inter Miami head coach
content: Javier Mascherano has quit as Inter Miami head coach, just four months after guiding the club to its first MLS Cup title.

title: Bronny's Nike 'B9' logo trademark filing denied
content: Nike's trademark filing for Lakers guard Bronny James' "B9" logo has been refused because of a "likelihood of confusion" with an already-registered mark.

title: Adderley joins Colts, ending 3-year retirement
content: Safety Nasir Adderley signed with the Colts on Tuesday, two months after he announced he was ready to return to the NFL after retiring following the 2022 season.

title: 📈 CFB Way-Too-Early Top 25: Spring update
content: With rosters settled and practices underway, we rank the top contenders for the 2026 college football season.

content: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the NBA title.

title: 'Charlotte's been starving': Inside Hornets' metamorphosis into the NBA's buzziest team
content: The Hornets are two wins away from snapping the NBA's longest current playoff drought. Can Charlotte end the futility by advancing out of the play-in against the Heat?

title: NBA experts' picks for Hornets-Heat, Blazers-Suns and first-round matchups
content: Our NBA experts pick which teams make it out of the play-in tournament and who wins first-round matchups.

content: One team set the curve with an A+. Three got A grades, including Dallas for picking Fudd. But one got a D.

content: Would it make sense for the Eagles, Bears and Chiefs to trade up? Should the Cowboys and Lions try to move down the board? Here's our advice for 10 teams.

content: He was "one of five" on Iowa's offensive line. That was before the mullet and personality took over the NFL combine.

content: There isn't much season left to determine playoff seeding and draft lottery order. Here's a rundown of what's on tap.

content: Get to know more about Stephanie McMahon, AJ Styles, Demolition, and others before the Hall of Fame event Friday.

title: How bad analytics built a Tottenham team that is heading for relegation
content: Tottenham are really bad and looking at the way this team has been constructed, one thing clearly stands out: This team is really bad at passing the ball, and that may explain their present malaise.

title: VAR review: Why Man United's Martinez saw red for hair pull
content: Lisandro Martinez was sent off on Monday for pulling the hair of Leeds United striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin.

title: Answering some big questions for the rest of the golf season
content: What can we expect next from Rory McIlroy? Who disappointed at the Masters? Will Scottie Scheffler add to his major total this year? We answer some big questions following the 2026 Masters.

title: WNBA free agency and trade tracker: Plum back to Sparks, McBride back to Lynx
content: WNBA free agency is here. Kelsey Plum is returning to Los Angeles. Kayla McBride is returning to Minnesota.

content: Last year, Florida was stunned in the NCAA gymnastics semifinals. This year, the Gators have unmatched depth -- and Tim Tebow's words of inspiration.

content: Tracking news and updates for players entering -- and exiting -- the transfer portal for the 2026-27 season.

content: Which 2026 WNBA draft picks are ready to contribute this season, and which should you stash for the future?

title: Transfer rumors, news: PSG battle Premier League trio for Newcastle youngster
content: Newcastle United midfielder Lewis Miley has received attention ahead of the summer, with Paris Saint-Germain, Manchester United, Arsenal and Chelsea. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Need Constitutional Protection For Manipur's 40 Valley Seats: BJP MLA Writes To Centre
content: Manipur BJP MLA Rajkumar Imo Singh asked the Centre to start a comprehensive crackdown on terror outfits, and sought justice for two children killed in a bomb attack while they were asleep in their house

title: Election Officer Dies By Suicide Weeks Before Local Body Polls In Gujarat
content: DC Brahmankachh, the mamlatdar and an election officer in Umargaon, reportedly jumped in front of a train late last night.

title: Zelensky Says US Does Not 'Have Time For Ukraine' Because Of Iran War: Report
content: Zelensky said that Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, who have helped broker talks with Moscow on ending Russia's war on Ukraine, were "constantly in talks with Iran" at the moment.

title: Lebanon And Israel Hold Historic Direct Talks Amid Ongoing Conflict
content: Rubio said the Trump administration is "very happy" to be facilitating the discussions, while noting that "we understand we're working against decades of history and complexities" that will not be quickly resolved.

title: World Economy Could Be "Thrown Off Course" By War In Middle East: IMF
content: The global economy is set to grow by 3.1 percent this year, said the International Monetary Fund in its World Economic Outlook report, released during its spring meetings in Washington.

title: "We All Love You": Trump's Huge Praise For PM Modi In Call
content: In their 40-minute call, which was their third phone conversation this year, US President Donald Trump briefed PM Narendra Modi about the situation in the Middle East.

title: Opinion: Blog | The Secret Behind Samrat Choudhary Getting Bihar's Top Job
content: The state's top job has never gone to the BJP. This is the first time a leader from the BJP is set to become the Chief Minister.

title: Explained: Is China Slowly Entering Iran War As US Blockades Hormuz?
content: The failure of Islamabad peace talks and the new counter-blockades that the US has imposed in the Strait of Hormuz have widened the horizon of the West Asia war.

title: Southern States To Benefit Despite Smaller Population: Sources On Quota Bill
content: Under the 1971 census, while the population growth in south Indian states has not kept pace with the north, the proposed provisions ensure a 50 per cent increase in the number of Lok Sabha seats allocated to them

title: Delhi Lt Governor Appreciates Police Action In Brigadier Assault Case
content: Lieutenant Governor Taranjit Singh Sandhu has been personally monitoring the probe into the assault on the Army Brigadier.

title: 'Act Against HR Executive': Mohandas Pai On 'Conversion', Harassment At TCS
content: Nashik TCS 'conversion' case: "What is senior management doing? What is the person whom this HR person was reporting to doing? You would have heard murmurs. You would have heard things," TV Mohandas Pai said

title: Xi Pushes 4-Point Peace Plan For Middle East, Promises To Help Boost Security
content: The announcement comes as the US and Iran deliberate on the possibility of another round of talks before the ceasefire expires after the talks in Pakistan broke down.

title: Maharashtra Man Sexually Exploits 180 Minors, Shoots 350 Videos, Arrested
content: Mohammad Ayaz allegedly lured the girls into a "love trap," took them to Mumbai and Pune, and filmed obscene videos of them.

title: Lebanon, Israel Start Direct Talks To Seize "Historic Opportunity" For Peace
content: Washington's top diplomat urgedIsraelandLebanonto seize a "historic opportunity" for peaceasdirecttalksbetween the two opened on Tuesday despite objections fromHezbollah, which announced freshattacksonIsraeljustasnegotiations got underway.

title: Ahead Of Women's Quota Bill, Madhya Pradesh Mapping Assembly Structure
content: Inside the Madhya Pradesh Legislative Assembly, the scale of change is already being mapped. The House, which currently operates with 230 seats and a majority mark of 116, could expand dramatically to 345 seats following delimitation.

title: US May Be Eyeing Strait Of Malacca After Hormuz. Why It Matters To India
content: Despite comparatively lower direct economic dependence, the United States views the strait through a strategic and military lens. Its narrow width at key points makes it both a potential bottleneck and a leverage point in any future conflict scenario.

title: 18 Injured In Protest Against Killing Of 2 Children In Manipur Bomb Attack
content: The protests intensified across the district, with many blocking the road between Bishnupur and Churachandpur

title: 'We all love you', Trump tells PM Modi during 40-min call on Iran war, Hormuz
content: Prime Minister Modi and US President Trump held a significant phone call, reviewing robust bilateral ties and progress in their Comprehensive Global Strategic Partnership. They also addressed the critical situation in West Asia, emphasizing the need for a secure and open Strait of Hormuz. This marks their third discussion this year, following recent peace talks.

title: Why is Pak desperate for US-Iran truce? Leaked details about Saudi pact expose reason
content: The disclosures, obtained by Drop Site News, show that the defense agreement between Riyadh and Islamabad, formally signed in 2025 as the Strategic Mutual Defense Agreement, has already been activated amid escalating regional war. The revelation comes after Saudi Arabia publicly announced on Saturday that Pakistani military forces, including aircraft, had arrived at King Abdulaziz Air Base in the kingdom’s Eastern Sector to boost joint operational readiness.

title: 'It's tough ... we'll have to make changes': Rahane's dressing room warning
content: KKR have endured a tough season so far and are currently languishing at the bottom of the standings. In five matches, they are yet to register a win, with four losses and one no result. With just one point and a net run rate of -1.383, KKR have significant ground to cover in the coming games.

title: 2 baraats reach venue for one bride in UP, cops ask woman to choose one
content: A wedding in Amroha faced chaos when two groom processions arrived for the same bride. The bride's family had cancelled a prior engagement and quickly arranged a new wedding for the same day. Police intervened, and the bride chose the groom from Sambhal, leading to the completion of that nikah while the other procession was sent back.

title: CEO Mark Zuckerberg has a new working desk at Meta office, as he 'wants to' sit next to…
content: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg has physically moved his desk into the company's AI lab, where he now sits alongside Superintelligence Labs head Alexandr Wang and codes for up to ten hours a week. Meta President Dina Powell McCormick confirmed the move, adding that Zuckerberg feels he needs to understand AI "at that level" to build the strongest possible model. It signals how seriously he is taking Meta's bid to compete with OpenAI and Google in the generative AI race.

title: IPL: Noor's trickery stands out as CSK hand KKR 4th defeat in 5 games
content: Kolkata Knight Riders slumped to a 32-run loss against Chennai Super Kings, exposing flaws in their batting approach and planning. Noor Ahmad’s spell triggered a collapse, while Rahane’s slow innings hurt the chase. Earlier, CSK posted 192/5 with key contributions from Samson, Mhatre and Brevis, before controlling the game with disciplined bowling.

title: FBI takes down website that stole millions from internet users across the world
content: A sophisticated global phishing operation, centered around the "W3LL phishing kit," has been dismantled by the FBI and Indonesian authorities. This "full-service" platform enabled cybercriminals to steal thousands of account credentials and attempt over $20 million in fraud. The alleged developer was detained in Indonesia, marking a significant blow to cybercrime.

title: The 'big brother' act: How BJP scripted Maharashtra playbook in Bihar
content: The BJP has secured its first chief minister in Bihar with Samrat Choudhary's election, marking a significant shift in the state's political landscape. This move mirrors the party's strategy in Maharashtra, where it reclaimed leadership by strategically strengthening its position within existing alliances, demonstrating a path to dominance without coalition breakdown.

title: AP Inter 1st, 2nd year result date: BIEAP to release IPE results on April 15 at 10.31am
content: Board of Intermediate Education, Andhra Pradesh (BIEAP) will release AP Inter 1st and 2nd year results 2026 on April 15 at 10:31 AM. Over 10.57 lakh students appeared for IPE March exams. Results will be available on resultsbie.ap.gov.in and via Mana Mitra WhatsApp service. The marks memo will include subject-wise scores and grades. Students can apply for recounting, while supplementary and improvement exams will be offered for those who need them or seek better scores respectively online.

title: Sindarov wins Candidates, sets up World C'ship clash with D Gukesh
content: Javokhir Sindarov clinched the FIDE Candidates 2026 title with a round to spare after an unbeaten run, sealing qualification for the World Championship with a draw against Anish Giri. The Uzbek GM showed consistency throughout, starting with a win over Andrey Esipenko and maintaining control with key draws. He will now face reigning champion D Gukesh for the title.

title: China blinks: Tanker that tested US blockade of Hormuz makes U-turn
content: A US-sanctioned tanker, the Rich Starry, linked to China, appeared to reverse course in the Gulf of Oman after transiting the Strait of Hormuz. Its movements are closely watched as a test of President Trump's naval blockade, with another tanker, Elpis, also showing unusual activity near Iran.

title: Travis Kelce’s ring for Taylor Swift sparks antique diamond trend
content: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have reignited interest in antique diamonds, shifting focus from flawless, mass-produced stones to rare, character-rich pieces. Their engagement spotlighted vintage craftsmanship, sustainability, and uniqueness. Jewellers report rising demand, though high-quality antique diamonds remain scarce and costly. As buyers seek meaning over perfection, these historic stones are becoming prized choices, blending romance, heritage, and individuality in modern engagement trends.

title: Floyd Mayweather hit with $100k lawsuit amid $7million tax debt
content: Boxing legend Floyd Mayweather Jr is once again in legal trouble after a company accused him of not paying for private jet services. A complaint filed in Los Angeles County claims that Jet Set Aircraft Inc. is owed more than $105,000. The case is linked to a private charter flight in 2025. The lawsuit also names Mayweather’s company, TBE Aviation, and other individuals who were allegedly involved in arranging the trip.

title: Rajesh Kumar sells car, takes public transport after clearing Rs 2 cr debt
content: Actor Rajesh Kumar, known for 'Sarabhai vs Sarabhai', is nearing financial recovery, with only 10-15% of his Rs 2 crore debt remaining. He recently sold his car due to Mumbai's traffic, not financial strain, and finds convenience in public transport. His sisters have now taken over his farming venture.

title: Injury scare? Virat Kohli trains with strapped knee ahead of LSG game
content: Virat Kohli was spotted training with his left knee heavily strapped ahead of Royal Challengers Bengaluru's IPL clash against Lucknow Super Giants. Despite a recent ankle niggle, Kohli displayed good form in the nets, easing fitness concerns. He has been in stellar form this season, amassing 179 runs in four matches.

title: Akshay Kumar fainted with 103 fever during Vaishno Devi trip, survived miraculously
content: Akshay Kumar's birth was a answered prayer at Vaishno Devi, with his parents requesting a naughty child. Years later, during a thanksgiving trip, a dangerously ill infant Akshay miraculously recovered after his mother's unwavering faith and prayers at the temple, a moment he believes was divine intervention.

title: Why CSK and KKR players are wearing black armbands - Explained
content: Kolkata Knight Riders players wore black armbands during their IPL 2026 match against Chennai Super Kings to mourn the passing of former India cricketer C. D. Gopinath. Gopinath was a member of India's first-ever Test-winning team and a significant figure in early Indian cricket history.

title: Dhurandhar 2 box office collection day 27: Ranveer Singh film inches toward Rs 1100 cr
content: Aditya Dhar’s espionage magnum opus, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', continues its unprecedented box office reign on Day 27. Having already made history as the first Hindi film to breach the Rs 1,000 crore India net milestone, the Ranveer Singh-starrer is now closing in on the Rs 1,100 crore domestic landmark. Despite the 2026 IPL season, the film's global footprint has expanded to a staggering Rs 1,718 crore. Stay updated with live tracking, weekly breakdowns, and day-wise earnings of this cinematic phenomenon.

title: Why 'Jesus' Trump pulled a TACO against Pope Leo XIV
content: If anything, this moment feels like a rare theological pullback, a reminder that the Church, for all its history of intrigue and compromise, still retains its oldest function: to define the boundaries of right and wrong when politics refuses to.

title: Boost for India! IMF raises GDP growth forecast to 6.5% despite Iran war
content: In India, growth for 2025 is revised upward by 1.0 percentage point relative to October, to 7.6 percent. IMF chief economist Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas noted that, in the absence of the conflict, growth projections for 2026 might have been revised upward to 3.4 percent.

title: No Dhoni for CSK again; star player returns for KKR
content: MS Dhoni's absence continues to be felt by CSK fans as he missed another IPL 2026 match due to a calf strain. Despite batting in the nets, the veteran is still recovering and has not yet regained full match fitness. The team, led by Ruturaj Gaikwad, is focused on finding the right combination and consistency.

title: Who is Samrat Choudhary, set to be new Bihar CM and BJP's first leader to take the top post
content: At 57, Choudhary has steadily risen through Bihar’s political ranks and is regarded as one of the BJP’s strongest organisational figures in the state. He currently holds the Home portfolio and has played a central role in the NDA government, often representing the BJP alongside Nitish Kumar at major official and political events.

title: PCB chief Naqvi trolled for 'long queues at petrol pumps in India' remark
content: Mohsin Naqvi faced backlash after claiming India was facing fuel shortages, despite Pakistan’s own energy crisis. His remarks came as PSL 2026 matches are held without crowds due to fuel and security issues. With prices rising over 40%, Pakistani people criticised his comments on social nedia, pointing out stable fuel conditions in India and questioning his claims.

title: Vikram Bhatt recalls jail ordeal in Rs 30 cr fraud case, feared dying
content: Filmmaker Vikram Bhatt recounts a harrowing health scare during his 2025-2026 incarceration in Udaipur Central Jail. Suffering from a severe fever and uncontrollable shivering due to his autoimmune condition, Bhatt faced delays in receiving medical attention. He turned to prayer and self-care, believing divine intervention aided his recovery before he was eventually taken to a hospital.

title: No handshake! India's Harika breaks silence on Uzbek GM's 'Namaste'
content: Harika Dronavalli clarified viral handshake incident with Nodirbek Yakubboev, saying there was no disrespect. He had pre-informed her he cannot do handshakes due to religious beliefs, and her instinctive resignation gesture caused confusion. She urged social media not to blame him. Similar past incidents exist with Vaishali Rameshbabu. Harika stressed mutual respect and focus on chess, despite controversy overshadowing results.

title: Noida protest: Police flag QR code-based WhatsApp 'syndicate', 7 FIRs filed, over 300 held
content: Following violent clashes over wage demands, Noida saw heavy police presence and route marches as investigators flagged a possible organized WhatsApp syndicate. Over 300 arrests were made, and seven FIRs registered, with the situation now under control after an interim 21% wage hike was announced.

title: Fan gives Kavya Maran a rose after SRH win - what she did next goes viral
content: Debutant pacers Hinge and Hussain picked four wickets each as Sunrisers Hyderabad ended table-toppers Rajasthan Royals’ winning streak in emphatic fashion. On a surface where the odd ball held up, Kishan struck eight fours and six sixes in a blistering 44-ball 91 to power SRH to 216/6. Anything full and wide was punished through the off side with ease, while short balls were dispatched with authority, helping the skipper bring up his 19th IPL fifty.

title: 'PM Modi is a deshdrohi': Rahul repeats his 'sold India in US trade deal' claim
content: In a two-pronged attack , Rahul Gandhi accused the BJP and the RSS of destroying the Constitution with their "hate-filled thinking", while claiming the ruling TMC has failed in fulfilling its promise of providing jobs to the state's youth. Addressing poll rallies in Raiganj and Malda, Gandhi claimed that 84 lakh youths in Bengal have applied for the unemployment allowance promised by the Mamata Banerjee government.

title: Why do humans blush? There is a hidden evolutionary reason that you can’t control
content: Blushing, a uniquely human physiological response, signals social awareness and genuine emotion. This involuntary reddening of the face, controlled by the sympathetic nervous system, acts as a non-verbal apology, helping to repair social mistakes and rebuild trust. Its honesty, due to its uncontrollability, makes it a valuable tool for maintaining social harmony.

title: 'Sab fake hai': Praful recreates Siraj moment after SRH win - WATCH
content: Debut sensation Praful Hinge etched his name in IPL history by claiming three wickets in the opening over against Rajasthan Royals. His remarkable spell, finishing with 4/34, propelled Sunrisers Hyderabad to a dominant 57-run victory.  Following the win, Hinge recreated a Mohammed Siraj-style video, humorously clarifying his official social media presence.

title: 'You are fired': CEO shares screenshots why he immediately fired an employee
content: Firing without giving a valid reason seems to be the new normal in corporates, but in a recent incident which sparked an online debate, a CEO shared on his social media profile why he fired one of his employees in a message.

title: US navy revives 'tanker war' playbook, launches mine-clearing ops in Persian Gulf
content: The US Navy has once again entered the Strait of Hormuz to hunt mines laid by the Iranians. This a repeat of the role played by the US Navy during the Tanker War, a part of the almost 8-year long Iran-Iraq War.

title: Fury is back at heavyweight; where does he land?
content: Tyson Fury ends his short-lived retirement by routing arslanbek Makhmudov . the win allows Fury to return to the rankings at heavyweight after a brief absence . "The Gypsy King" slots in at No. 2 behind the only man to have beaten him in his pro career, Oleksandr Usyk .

title: UCL live: Atletico reclaim aggregate lead; PSG retain 2-goal advantage
content: THE CHAMPIONS! This week, we will decide who the four semifinalists are in the  UEFA Champions League  as the second leg of each of the four quarterfinal matches will take place Tuesday and Wednesday. In Tuesday's matches,  Barcelona  will look to overcome a 2-0 deficit as they travel to face  Atlético Madrid . Meanwhile, can Anfield serve as some inspiration for  Liverpool  as they also look to overcome a 2-0 deficit, or will defending champions  Paris Saint-Germain  add to their aggregate score? Enjoy all the updates from Tuesday's matches.
